tools.name: Juris-Sync
tools.description: Fetches updated statutory law text relevant to the legal topic provided. Simulates a live legal database API.

topic.description: Legal topic to fetch rules for

year_from.description: Filter laws enacted from this year

tools.name: Fact-Conflict
tools.description: Compares client's statement against retrieved facts and documents to detect contradictions. Outputs conflict list and risk score.

retrieved_facts.description: Facts extracted from documents and Knowledge AI

risk_score.description: 0-100 risk score. Higher = more contradictions / weaker case

tools.name: Gap-Detector
tools.description: Compares documents provided by client against the mandatory evidence checklist. Outputs list of missing documents.

provided_documents.description: List of document types the client has provided

checklist_id.description: ID of the checklist to validate against

tools.name: Precedent-Ranker
tools.description: Ranks case law precedents by relevance to the current case using semantic similarity and factual matching.
tools.koreai_node_type: Service Node (Knowledge AI) + Script Node (ranking logic)

case_summary.description: Brief summary of current case facts
case_summary.example: Buyer paid full amount, builder delayed possession by 28 months in Maharashtra

top_n.description: Number of top precedents to return

tools.sample_logic:
def precedent_ranker(case_summary, key_factors, top_n=3):
    # Semantic search in Knowledge AI for case_precedents.md
    results = knowledge_ai.search(query=case_summary, collection='Justicia-Legal-KB', filters={'source': 'case_precedents'}, top_k=10)
    # Score each result by factor overlap
    scored = []
    for r in results:
        factor_score = sum(1 for f in key_factors if f.lower() in r.content.lower())
        total_score = (r.semantic_score * 0.6) + (factor_score / len(key_factors) * 0.4)
        scored.append({**r.metadata, 'relevance_score': round(total_score, 2)})
    ranked = sorted(scored, key=lambda x: x['relevance_score'], reverse=True)[:top_n]
    return {'ranked_cases': [{'rank': i+1, **c} for i, c in enumerate(ranked)]}

tools.name: Ethical-Guard
tools.description: Validates that the generated legal strategy is neutral, factually grounded, and does not contain biased, harmful, or legally irresponsible content.

strategy_draft.description: Draft legal strategy text to be validated

case_facts.description: Verified case facts for grounding check

tools.sample_logic:
def ethical_guard(strategy_draft, case_facts):
    issues = []
    score = 100

    # Check for ungrounded claims
    if 'guaranteed win' in strategy_draft.lower() or 'certain victory' in strategy_draft.lower():
        issues.append({'issue_type': 'overconfidence', 'description': 'Strategy makes outcome guarantees', 'severity': 'high'})
        score -= 30

    # Check for bias against builder without evidence
    if 'fraud' in strategy_draft.lower() and 'fraud' not in str(case_facts).lower():
        issues.append({'issue_type': 'ungrounded_allegation', 'description': 'Fraud alleged without factual basis', 'severity': 'high'})
        score -= 40

    # Check for missing disclaimer
    if 'not legal advice' not in strategy_draft.lower():
        issues.append({'issue_type': 'missing_disclaimer', 'description': 'Legal disclaimer absent', 'severity': 'medium'})
        score -= 10

    flag = 'PASS' if score >= 70 else ('REVIEW' if score >= 50 else 'FAIL')
    return {'compliance_flag': flag, 'issues_found': issues, 'neutrality_score': score, 'approved_for_output': score >= 70}

tools.name: Strategy-Gen
tools.description: Generates a structured court-ready legal strategy using all verified inputs: conflicts, gaps, precedents, and statutory rules.
